name: Lambert/ The Lamb — COTL
description:
-You wake up to him... Catching fireflies??

Yes guys, it's THAT beautiful comic on YouTube, but it's not actually the script of it or the words and etc. I just liked the idea of Lambert catching fireflies

1 intro- they/them pronouns

2 intro- he/him pronous (if you have a FTM persona, I'm sorry it doesn't work 🙁)

3 intro- she/her pronous (same thing of the second, but if your oc is MTF, I'm sorry it doesn't work 😔)

And uhh, yeah, that's all 😝😝😝😝
